raw_consumer_statement:
Summary of Unauthorized Charges XXXX XXXX Production Merchant : XXXX XXXX Production Address : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX, TX XXXX Phone : ( XXXX ) XXXX Website : XXXX Authorized Transaction ( Only One ) On XX/XX/XXXX, we authorized a one-time charge of {$600.00} to XXXX XXXX XXXX for a High School XXXX Basketball banner advertisement. 

This transaction is supported by : A completed advertising order form dated XX/XX/XXXX An XXXX  transaction receipt dated XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX XXXX Invoice/Account number XXXX The order form reflects : Total sale : {$600.00} Deposit : {$600.00} Balance due : {$0.00} No subscription, renewal, or recurring billing authorization This was clearly a single, fully paid transaction, not a recurring service. 
This XX/XX/XXXX charge is the first and only authorized charge. 

After payment : XXXX XXXX  XXXX never provided proof that the banner was produced or displayed No photos, confirmation, delivery notice, or placement verification were ever sent Requests for documentation and receipts for later charges were ignored or not fulfilled Despite payment, the agreed service was never substantiated. 
Unauthorized Charges ( Not Approved ) After the XX/XX/XXXX transaction, four additional charges of {$600.00} each were processed without authorization, consent, or notice : Date Amount Status XX/XX/XXXX {$600.00} Unauthorized XX/XX/XXXX {$600.00} Unauthorized XX/XX/XXXX {$600.00} Unauthorized XX/XX/XXXX {$600.00} Unauthorized These charges total {$2400.00} There is no contract, no renewal agreement, and no recurring billing authorization No invoices, receipts, or explanations were provided for these charges The merchant never obtained approval to store or reuse card details We reviewed account activity and identified repeated unauthorized charges We confirmed that no authorization existed beyond XX/XX/XXXX We requested receipts and proof of service, which were not provided We gathered and preserved all documentation supporting the one-time purchase We are now disputing all post-XXXX XXXX, XXXX charges as unauthorized
